title: OPEN DOOR MINISTRIES - 211info
text: BEND UNITED METHODIST CHURCH OPEN DOOR MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to temporary mail services, a clothing closet, and gasoline cards. 680 NW Bond Street Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Mail room: Monday-Friday 1pm-3pm Clothing closet: Monday/Wednesday 1pm-3pm Compassionate Care Financial Aid: Wednesday 1pm until capacity is reached Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, volunteer staff are unable to return phone calls or emails. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Office hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm, Worship Service: Sunday 10am Services: Gas Money General Clothing Provision Temporary Mailing Address If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND UNITED METHODIST CHURCH
